data.title: Hankook's iON Race Heads to Formula E's Longest Circuit for Madrid Debut
data.description: Round 6 of Formula E Season 12 is scheduled to take place in Madrid on March 21st at the Circuito del Jarama. The track at Jarama, spanning 3.934 km, will be the longest circuit in Formula E history. The event will showcase new features like PIT BOOST, an updated ATTACK MODE, and a 23-lap race. Hankook's iON Race will be used for its reliable grip and ability to maintain thermal stability on Jarama's challenging track.

data.title: Bionano Genomics Earnings Are Imminent; These Most Accurate Analysts Revise Forecasts Ahead Of Earnings Call
data.description: Bionano Genomics, Inc. is set to announce its Q4 earnings on March 23 after the market closes. Analysts forecast the San Diego-based company to post a quarterly loss of $1.40 per share with revenue hitting $7.85 million. Bionano Genomics previously projected Q4 revenue to range between $7.8 million and $8.0 million, and anticipates total revenue for FY25 to stand at $28.4 million to $28.6 million. The company's shares concluded trading at $1.12 on Thursday. For further insights, Benzinga Pro offers the newest analyst ratings on its Analyst Stock Ratings page, where readers can filter by stock ticker, company name, analyst firm, rating change, and more.

data.title: Global Diagnostic Labs Market to Grow at a CAGR of 6.66%, Reaching USD 223 Billion by 2032, Reports Vyansa Intelligence
data.description: A recent market research report by Vyansa Intelligence revealed that the Global Diagnostic Labs Market is anticipated to experience a steady growth, with a projected compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of approximately 6.66% between 2026 and 2032. data.title: Trump Jr Says AI Agents That Can Think But Can't Pay Are Just 'Expensive Interns' — Touts New World Liberty Financial Infrastructure
data.description: Donald Trump Jr. recently endorsed World Liberty Financial's (WLFI) new payment infrastructure that allows AI agents to handle funds and conduct transactions on the blockchain. Trump Jr. highlighted the AgentPay Software Development Kit, describing it as "open source, self-custodial, and policy-first," suggesting that it could facilitate settlements for transactions as low as USD1. He emphasized the importance of AI agents being able to make payments efficiently, stating that "AI agents that can reason but can't pay for anything are just expensive interns." World Liberty Financial has officially launched this infrastructure, enabling agents to transfer and trade funds programmatically based on pre-defined rules enforced by WLFI. For more details, refer to the full article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Alstom S.A : Alstom signs a 5-year contract extension to operate and maintain the GO Transit and UP express fleets in Toronto, Canada
data.description: Alstom has recently secured a significant contract extension in Toronto, Canada, agreeing to a 5-year deal to oversee the operation and maintenance of the GO Transit and UP Express fleets. This new agreement underscores the company's commitment to providing transportation services in the region.
